profile.name: Avinash J
profile.tagline: I craft beautiful websites and compelling video edits — turning ideas into digital experiences that leave a lasting impression.
profile.bio: I'm Avinash J, a passionate web developer and video editor based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. I love building clean, responsive websites and creating visually engaging video content. Whether it's designing a pixel-perfect UI or cutting and colour-grading a reel, I bring creativity and attention to detail to everything I make. I'm currently exploring new opportunities and excited to grow in both the web and creative industries.

testimonials.quote: Avinash is one of those rare engineers who can zoom out to understand the business impact and zoom in to write beautiful, maintainable code. He elevated every codebase he touched at Stripe.
testimonials.name: Priya Mehta

testimonials.quote: The RAG pipeline Avinash architected for our internal knowledge base completely changed how our engineering org shares and retrieves information. It's genuinely one of the most impactful internal tools we've built.
testimonials.name: Jordan Lee

testimonials.quote: Working with Avinash is a masterclass in clarity. He asks the right questions, proposes elegant solutions, and ships with very few surprises. I'd hire him again in a heartbeat.
testimonials.name: Rahul Sharma

testimonials.quote: Avinash mentored me through my first year as a software engineer. His feedback was honest, structured, and kind. He has a real gift for making complex systems understandable.
testimonials.name: Sneha Patel
